entry.message: [info] Activation of plug-in DQC Rules Validator successful, version Check version using Tools->DQC->Version on the GUI or --dqc-version on the command line. - validate/DQC
[info] Activation of plug-in SEC Inline Transforms successful, version 19.2. - EDGAR/transform
[info] Activation of plug-in Inline XBRL Document Set successful, version 1.1. - inlineXbrlDocumentSet
[info] Xule version: 3.0.30050 -
[info] loaded in 4.41 secs at 2026-05-19T16:29:53 - http://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/31107/000165495426002506/eml_10ka.htm
[xule.buildIndexTime] Index build time 0:00:00.081621. - http://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/31107/000165495426002506/eml_10ka.htm
[xule.ruleDebug] Processing: DQC.US.0154.10069 - 16:30:02.578732 - http://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/31107/000165495426002506/eml_10ka.htm
[xule.ruleDebug] http://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/31107/000165495426002506/eml_10ka.htm - http://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/31107/000165495426002506/eml_10ka.htm

[DQC.US.0154.10069] The filer has reported a value for global intangible low-taxed income that is not using the element defined in the US-GAAP taxonomy. The FASB has added elements for the GILTI percentage amount and the GILTI monetary amount in the 2022 taxonomy. These elements are:
1. EffectiveIncomeTaxRateReconciliationGiltiPercent 2. EffectiveIncomeTaxRateReconciliationGiltiAmount
The element eml:EffectOfCrossBorderTaxLawsGlobalintangiblelowtaxedincome with the label "Global intangible low-taxed income" has been used in the filing in the disclosure section "995595 - Disclosure - Income Taxes (Details 3)" that should be updated to the appropriate US-GAAP element listed above.
Rule Element Id:10069 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - eml_10ka.htm 2

[DQC.US.0154.10069] The filer has reported a value for global intangible low-taxed income that is not using the element defined in the US-GAAP taxonomy. The FASB has added elements for the GILTI percentage amount and the GILTI monetary amount in the 2022 taxonomy. These elements are:
1. EffectiveIncomeTaxRateReconciliationGiltiPercent 2. EffectiveIncomeTaxRateReconciliationGiltiAmount
The element eml:EffectOfCrossBorderTaxLawsGlobalintangiblelowtaxedincome with the label "Global intangible low-taxed income" has been used in the filing in the disclosure section "995595 - Disclosure - Income Taxes (Details 3)" that should be updated to the appropriate US-GAAP element listed above.
Rule Element Id:10069 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - eml_10ka.htm 2
